blurb: London-founded voice-agent company. Launch coverage uses verified compliance documentation and checked-empty role status.

publications.title: Compliance — PolyAI Platform
publications.summary: PolyAI documentation states its platform compliance posture, including GDPR-relevant controls for enterprise voice agents. It is lower-cost evidence than a policy paper, but it is first-party and directly relevant to regulated AI deployment.

publications.title: Introducing Agent Studio: The only voice-first omnichannel platform for conversational AI
publications.summary: PolyAI launched Agent Studio with enterprise controls for voice AI agents, including transparency and governance-oriented deployment features.

publications.title: How to implement generative AI guardrails & secure LLMs
publications.summary: PolyAI explains guardrails for generative AI bots, including data-protection compliance, human oversight, policy frameworks and continuous monitoring.
